summary: Comprehensive testing of database-driven geo pages: Backend API (100% pass), Frontend geo pages rendering with API data (100% pass), Admin CMS (100% pass). All 34 geo pages are stored in MongoDB and fully editable via the Admin CMS at /admin/geo-pages.

GET /api/geo-pages.notes: Returns list of 34 geo pages with slug, locationName, region, heroTitle, heroHighlight, active fields

GET /api/geo-pages/slug/dubai/palm-jumei.notes: Returns full page data including stats, communities, services, faqs, ctaTitle

GET /api/geo-pages/slug/uae/dubai.notes: Returns full page data for UAE Dubai

GET /api/geo-pages/slug/saudi-arabia/riy.notes: Returns full page data for Riyadh

GET /api/geo-pages/slug/uae/ajman.notes: Returns full page data for UAE Ajman

PUT /api/geo-pages/slug/dubai/palm-jumei.notes: Successfully updates heroTitle and communities with persistence verification

geo_pages_list.notes: Shows 34 Total Pages, 7 Dubai, 6 Abu Dhabi, 14 International. Pages grouped by region.

search_filter.notes: Search by 'Palm' correctly filters to show only Palm Jumeirah

sections_found: Hero Section (Location Name, Region, Hero Title, Hero Highlight, Hero Description, Hero Image URL)

save_functionality.notes: Save button works, shows 'Palm Jumeirah updated successfully' toast message

success_rate.frontend: 100% (4 geo pages tested, all rendering correctly with API data)
success_rate.admin_cms: 100% (list, search, edit form, save all working)

seed_data_creation: 34 geo pages already seeded in MongoDB
context_for_next_testing_agent: All database-driven geo page features tested and working: GET /api/geo-pages returns 34 pages, GET/PUT by slug works correctly, frontend pages fetch and display API data with static fallback, Admin CMS at /admin/geo-pages allows listing, searching, and editing all page content (Hero, Stats, Communities, Services, FAQs, CTA). Save functionality verified with success toast message.
